query:
SELECT
            (
                SELECT t.id
                FROM threads t
                WHERE t.mod_id = $1
                ORDER BY t.id
                LIMIT 1
            ) AS "thread_id: DBThreadId",
            (
                SELECT tm.body->>'type'
                FROM threads t
                INNER JOIN threads_messages tm ON tm.thread_id = t.id
                WHERE
                    t.mod_id = $1
                    AND tm.body->>'type' = ANY($2::text[])
                ORDER BY tm.created DESC, tm.id DESC
                LIMIT 1
            ) AS "last_tech_review_message_type"
